zh.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾布拉可維爾
zh.Bracewell, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾布拉可維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Piers Tempest於大約1382年出生在英國越可爾布拉可維爾時，他的父親Sir Richard VII Tempest27歲，母親Margaret Staynforth19歲。他於1395年與Grace Hebden在英國越可爾布拉可維爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1400年登記服兵役。他去世於1417年在英國越可爾衛克菲德享年36歲。

zh-hans.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾布拉可維爾
zh-hans.Bracewell, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾布拉可維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Piers Tempest于大约1382年出生在英国越可爾布拉可維爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard VII Tempest27岁，母亲Margaret Staynforth19岁。他于1395年与Grace Hebden在英国越可爾布拉可維爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1400年登记服兵役。他去世于1417年在英国越可爾衛克菲德享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tempest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): nickname for someone with a blustery temperament, from Middle English, Old French tempest(e) ‘storm’ (from Latin tempestas ‘weather, season’, a derivative of tempus ‘time’).

variants.name: Tempesta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Raffaele, Agostino, Angelo, Carmelo, Cesare, Cesidio, Dante, Elio, Ezio, Gino.
Italian: nickname for someone with a stormy temperament, from tempesta ‘storm, tempest’ (see Tempest ).

nameMeanings.name: Piers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Regular medieval vernacular form of Peter (from the Old French nominative case, as against the oblique Pier, modern Pierre). In the form Pierce it survived into the 18th century, although in part this may be a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name. Piers was revived in the mid-20th century, perhaps partly under the influence of William Langland's great rambling medieval poem Piers Plowman ( 1367–86 ), in which the character of Piers symbolizes the virtues of hard work, honesty, and fairness.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Piers Tempest was born about 1382, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Richard VII Tempest, was 27 and his mother, Margaret Staynforth, was 19. He married Grace Hebden in 1395, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1400. He died in 1417, in Wakefield, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Piers Tempest est né environ 1382, à Bracewell, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard VII Tempest, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret Staynforth, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Grace Hebden en 1395, à Bracewell, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1400. Il est décédé en 1417, à Wakefield, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Piers Tempest um 1382 in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard VII Tempest 27 und seine Mutter Margaret Staynforth 19. Er hat 1395 in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England Grace Hebden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1400 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1417 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Wakefield, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Piers Tempest è nato il circa 1382 nel Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard VII Tempest, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Staynforth, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Grace Hebden nel 1395, nel Bracewell, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1400. Morì nel 1417, nel Wakefield, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.Bracewell, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアブレイセウエル
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Piers Tempestが約1382年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard VII Tempestは27歳，母Margaret Staynforthは19歳であった。1395年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルでGrace Hebdenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1400年に兵役登録をした。彼は1417年にイギリスヨークシュアイアワケフィールドで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Piers Tempest(이)가 대략 1382년 영국 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard VII Tempest(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Staynforth(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1395년 영국 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 Grace Hebden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1417년 영국 요르크실르 웨이크필드에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Piers Tempest nasceu aproximadamente 1382, em Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard VII Tempest, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Staynforth, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Grace Hebden em 1395, em Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1400. Ele faleceu em 1417, em Wakefield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Piers Tempest родился около 1382 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard VII Tempest было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Staynforth, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Grace Hebden в 1395 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. В 1400 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1417 г. в местности веикефиелд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Piers Tempest nació aproximadamente 1382, en Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard VII Tempest, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margaret Staynforth, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Grace Hebden en 1395, en Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1400. Murió en 1417, en Wakefield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años.
